overview.description: The ProShares Short MSCI Emerging Markets (EUM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets index. The fund provides inverse exposure to an index representing 85% of the market cap in emerging markets. EUM was launched on Nov 1, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
